prompt: Create a high-quality mixed media image that blends realistic photography with vector illustration. Use the attached image strictly for facial identity matching only: the face shape, glasses, eyes, nose, lips, and hair texture must match exactly, while clothing, pose, lighting, and background must not be copied from the reference. The result should be a high-resolution full-body studio portrait of a person in a dynamic, confident pose against a solid bright blue background, combining realistic photography with white hand-drawn vector doodles and abstract blue liquid shapes for a modern street-art editorial look. The environment is a studio graphic design composition with an energetic, urban, creative, cool atmosphere. Use artificial studio lighting that is soft, diffused, neutral white, and dominant from the front-right, with an even, shadow-free background. The palette should focus on a bright blue background, deep blue clothing, and white graphic accents with high contrast. Use a low-angle, slightly upward camera view, full-body framing from head to toe, deep focus, and keep the face and upper torso as the focal point, with asymmetrical balance and graphics filling the negative space. The subject stands with relaxed confidence, body angled slightly right, head tilted slightly left, one hand raised near the face, and legs casually crossed, with a neutral, calm, confident expression. Outfit: monochromatic blue streetwear, including an open blue fleece-style jacket, a blue t-shirt with a large white abstract graphic symbol, dark blue denim jeans with visible white contrast stitching and rolled cuffs, and clean white low-top sneakers. Add white hand-drawn doodles: a microphone outline near the raised hand, a floating boombox to the side, radiating sound or motion lines around the head, cracked ground beneath the feet, and abstract blue liquid shapes behind the subject. Maintain shar separation between photo and vector layers. Low noise, low compression artifacts, standard port lens feel around 35-50mm
